# CloakShare — Full Product Reference
> Open-source secure document and video sharing platform. Self-hostable alternative to DocSend.

## Product Overview
CloakShare is an open-source API and embeddable viewer for secure document and video sharing. It provides watermarking, email gating, document expiry, and per-page analytics. Property of the document owner, not a SaaS vendor. Self-hostable via Docker or available as managed cloud.

## Core Features

### Document Sharing
- Upload PDF, DOCX, PPTX documents
- Canvas-based rendering (prevents copy/paste, screenshot protection)
- Dynamic watermarks with viewer's email baked into every page
- Email gating (viewers must enter email to access)
- Link expiry (auto-revoke access after date or view count)
- Per-page analytics (who viewed which page, time spent)
- Password protection

### Video Sharing
- Upload and share videos with same controls as documents
- Watermarked video playback
- Email-gated video access
- View tracking and analytics

### Self-Hosting
- Docker Compose deployment
- Full source code access (MIT license)
- No per-user pricing
- Complete data ownership

## Technical Architecture
- API-first design (REST API)
- Embeddable viewer component
- Shadow DOM isolation for embedding
- PostgreSQL database
- S3-compatible storage

## Pricing
- Free tier available (open source, self-host)
- Cloud: Contact for pricing
- No per-user fees

## Competitive Positioning
- DocSend charges $15-$90/user/month with feature gating
- CloakShare is open source with no per-user pricing
- Only platform combining document AND video sharing with watermarks
- Self-hostable for complete data control

## Key Differentiators
1. Video + document sharing combined (unique — no competitor does both)
2. Self-hostable via Docker (complete data ownership)
3. No per-user pricing (flat rate or free self-hosted)
4. Canvas-based rendering (prevents copy/paste)
5. Open source (MIT license)

## Links
- Website: https://www.cloakshare.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/cloakshare/cloakshare
